Regarding costco, remove Greed. Not the best R wheel, you can take it on the levels where you need to buy 8 artifacts for the achievements. Gluttony is a MUST have wheel on any Arc 1 team and Whisper is good to have as well.

It's not like it's terrible, but Gluttony/Whisper are just better and you don't always get all the good relics to choose from either way, so having Greed might be a wasted slot sometimes.

Generally speaking, don't put all of keyflare/aliemus wheels into one team even if that would be BiS for some Awakeners. Spread all your wheels within your available teams.
You always need to have a good generating Keyflare unit on a team since Arc 2 ruleset *really* needs that.
After you make your adjustments, send the results here to further optimise wheels/covenants.

<@113374123798859776>  I am in need of assistance of your expertise
You have those per card usually

Kath gimmick is Fiamma, when her cards are on fire their numbers are multiplied

When you play a fiamma card, you apply fiamma to another kath card in hand, and you also get stacks of Combust (permanently increasing kath's damage if you have e3)

When you have 10 combust, you get +2 arith and solarflare turns into hyperflare
Combust is a status effect you can see it on your healthbar
When you play hyperflare you remove all stacks of combust and deal bonus damage for every stack

what would still be considered early? i heard once you get past ch 7 the difficulty spikes or smth

I would say early is Chapters 1-7(maybe 8 as well). Chapter 9 is when the game becomes more difficult, but also kind of “stat checky” in the sense of “you shouldn’t be here with under-leveled units and low enlightenments”, and of course “you should understand the game mechanics and teambuilding w/ wheels, by now”. 
However, all of this is my opinion. This is different for everyone, and difficulty can vary for different people. Keep asking questions and learning information, and you’ll be fine~
got it thank you <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>

If you struggle with so called “easy” content, just know it’s not easy for everyone, and it’s okay to struggle. Just be willing to ask questions, and understand the fight better, or the source of your lost. People here will help ya if you ever need a hand, easy or difficult content~
